case_title: JAN BARRON VS. WISE MEN CONSTRUCTION & REMOLDING, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARRON, JAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WISE MEN CONSTRUCTION & REMOLDING, INC. THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-13-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINITFF JAN BARRON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WISEMAN CONSTRUCTION & REMOLDING INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS DEFECTIVE AGENT FOR SERVICE WAS NOT SERVED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WISE MEN CONSTRUCTION & REMOLDING, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JAN BARRON APPEARED. DEFENDANT WISE MEN CONSTRUCTION & REMOLDING, INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY JAMES NAVARRO, OWNER/CONTRACTOR. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,578.54 FILED BY BARRON, JAN AS TO DEFENDANT WISE MEN CONSTRUCTION & REMOLDING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
